hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build digital experiences with cutting-edge technologies. Specialized in Vue.js, TypeScript and scalable architectures.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Meet the developer behind the code
about.story: Developer with more than 3 years of experience creating modern and scalable web applications. My passion for technology keeps me constantly updated with the latest development trends. Specialized in JavaScript ecosystems, cloud architectures and agile methodologies.

results.title: Results Focused
results.description: I optimize every line of code for maximum performance

agile.title: Agile Methodology
agile.description: Scrum and iterative development for fast deliveries

items.description: Leading the development of mission-critical Vue.js applications for enterprise clients. Implementing micro-frontends, performance optimization and mentoring junior developers.
Full stack development with Node.js and React for real-time data analytics platform. Microservices architecture, cloud migration (AWS) and WebSockets.
Web project development for various clients, from landing pages to complete applications. Focus on user experience and responsive design.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects that demonstrate my technical skills

items.title: Trello Clone - Project Management
items.description: Complete task management application with boards, lists and cards like Trello. Drag & drop, labels and real-time collaboration.
items.problem: Teams need a visual and collaborative tool to organize projects without relying on complex paid solutions.
items.role: Full Stack Developer - Designed architecture, implemented JWT authentication and drag & drop interface.
items.metrics: Reduced task organization time by 60% for teams of up to 10 people.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard - Real Time
items.description: Interactive control panel for real-time business metrics visualization with dynamic charts and advanced filters.
items.problem: Companies need to visualize their data immediately and make decisions based on updated information.
items.role: Frontend Developer - Implemented visualizations with D3.js, WebSocket connection and performance optimization.
items.metrics: Processing 10,000 events per second with latency < 100ms.

items.title: REST API Documented - Billing System
items.description: RESTful API for billing management with authentication, user roles and interactive Swagger documentation.
items.problem: Small businesses need a secure and well-documented API to integrate their billing systems.
items.role: Backend Developer - Designed architecture, implemented JWT authentication, roles and OpenAPI documentation.
items.metrics: API with 99.9% availability and unit tests with 95% coverage.
